toolSpec.name: get_nutritions_and_ingredients_by_weight
toolSpec.description: Combined lookup: returns actual nutrition facts (calories, protein, fat, carbs) calculated based on the provided weight_g, AND ingredient list for a food item. Returns {description, nutritions: {calories, protein, fat, carbs}, weight_g, ingredients: [...] or null}. Use this to get actual estimated nutrition for ingredients or dishes.

food_name.description: Name of the food item in English (e.g., 'fried rice', 'grilled pork', 'pho bo')

weight_g.description: The estimated weight of the food item in grams (e.g., 150.0)
